TROPICAL DEPRESSION KIYAPO CONTINUES TO MOVE WEST NORTHWESTWARD WHILE MAINTAINING ITS STRENGTH.

KIYAPO HAS MADE LANDFALL OVER CAMIGUIN ISLAND, CALAYAN, CAGAYAN Location of Center (4:00 PM) The center of Tropical Storm KIYAPO was estimated based on all available data at over the coastal waters of Calayan Island, Calayan, Cagayan (19.1°N, 121.6°E).
